title: IF-0-DISSECT-1 tool-usage profile — v0 DRAFT (pre-inspection)
description: DRAFT schema emitted BEFORE any real jsonl inspection, derived ONLY from the roadmap spec (specs/phase-plans-v8.md, IF-0-DISSECT-1, ~line 281-287). Holds NO data-derived specifics (no discovered task_type enum, no tool-name list, no type vocabulary). It exists so the v0->v1 ordering is auditable in git history. The frozen v1 schema (schema.v1.json) supersedes this after lane (a)'s first real jsonl inspection. Do NOT validate datasets against v0.

schema_version.description: Must be the v0 draft marker; v1 uses a distinct value.

verdicts.description: Top-level per-harness feasibility verdict records (metadata only). IF-0-DISSECT-1: 'plus a top-level per-harness feasibility verdict record'.

rows.description: per-(task_type, tool_name) rows. Shape dictated by the spec: {call_count, arg_keys, arg_shape_sample, frequency}. METADATA ONLY.

task_type.description: Coarse task classification (heuristic documented in report.md). Enum values NOT fixed at v0 — frozen in v1 after inspection.

arg_shape_sample.description: Argument SHAPE/type only, e.g. {"file_path":"string"}. NEVER raw values. Leaf-value type vocabulary frozen in v1.
